health.message: OKN's social presence is growing well across key metrics.

recommendations.message: On Instagram, your best content type is 'short_video' with 20.5% avg engagement (8 posts). Create more of this.
On TikTok, your best content type is 'short_video' with 9.2% avg engagement (15 posts). Create more of this.
Viral content on Instagram is: short_video. Create more content in these formats.
Viral content on TikTok is: short_video. Create more content in these formats.
Comments-to-likes ratio is low. Try asking questions, running polls, or creating discussion-worthy content.
Not enough data per time slot to recommend posting hours yet. Keep adding weekly exports.
Instagram is outperforming industry benchmark by 17.2%! Keep up the great work.
TikTok is outperforming industry benchmark by 6.7%! Keep up the great work.
Instagram reach is growing! Keep up the momentum.
TikTok reach is growing! Keep up the momentum.
Note: Instagram engagement rate uses reach as denominator; TikTok uses views. Direct rate comparison between platforms should be interpreted with this in mind.
